Under New Management — A Fresh Chapter Begins

Our new team has invested in renovated rooms, enhanced services, and a renewed commitment to exceptional hospitality. Same beloved Juja location — a brand new experience awaiting you.

✓ Renovated Rooms ✓ Enhanced Pool Area ✓ Pool & Billiards Tables ✓ Upgraded WiFi ✓ New Management Team

Lilies Hotel & Guest Rooms

A warm, welcoming home in the heart of Juja, Nairobi

Our Story

A Bloom of
Timeless Hospitality

Lilies Hotel has been welcoming guests from all over Kenya and beyond — offering warm African hospitality and comfortable, affordable lodging. Our property features spacious rooms, a beautiful outdoor swimming pool, and a relaxed recreation area.

Now under fresh leadership, we've elevated every corner of the hotel while preserving the warmth our guests have always loved. Whether here for business or leisure, Lilies Hotel is your home away from home.

★★★
Rated Property
6+
Years Service
4.3★
Guest Rating

What We Offer

Our Amenities

Daily Housekeeping

Room refreshed every morning with fresh linens, spotless surfaces, and replenished toiletries.

Breakfast Available

Freshly prepared local dishes and beverages served every morning to start your day right.

Self-Serve Laundry

On-site laundry facilities with modern machines available on your own schedule.

Outdoor Pool

Large sparkling outdoor pool surrounded by shaded seating and lush greenery — open daily.

24-Hour Front Desk

Our friendly team on hand around the clock for check-in, assistance, and recommendations.

Free Parking

Spacious, secure on-site parking for all hotel guests — complimentary, any time of day.

Fun & Recreation

More Than
Just a Room

Unwind at Lilies Hotel's outdoor recreation zone — shoot a game of pool on our full-size billiard tables, relax under the shaded seating area, or take a refreshing dip in our spacious swimming pool.

Our recreation area is open daily — the perfect social spot to kick back and enjoy great company in a relaxed, garden environment.

🎱 Billiards Tables 🏊 Swimming Pool ⛱️ Shaded Seating Garden Area Outdoor Bar

Guest Reviews

What Our Guests Say

★★★★★

"The new management has truly transformed this place. Everything from the rooms to the breakfast was fresher and better organised than my last visit. Highly recommend!"

— Amara Nyambura, Nairobi
★★★★★

"Beautifully maintained and quiet. The 24-hour front desk sorted my early checkout without a fuss. The pool is amazing — perfect after a long drive. Will definitely be back."

— James Mwangi, Mombasa
★★★★★

"The pool, the free parking, the daily housekeeping — everything worked seamlessly. And the billiards tables were a great bonus! Felt like a real getaway. Loved it."

— Joseph M., Kisumu
